mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obdlvrysbmmgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectDlvryCorp - 택배접수 관리 - 택배사코드 조회 */ SELECT DLVRYCORPCD /*택배사코드*/ , DLVRYCORPNM /*택배사명*/ FROM TWORK_MST_DLVRYCORP /*택배사 마스터*/ WHERE CTKEY = COALESCE(#{CTKEY}, #{sctkey}) AND OWKEY = COALESCE(#{OWKEY}, #{sowkey}) AND DELYN = 'N' AND CNTRCTNO IS NOT NULL AND TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN CNTRCTSTARTDAY AND CNTRCTCLOSEDAY

/* wms-outbound-obdlvrysbmmgmt-sql-oracle.xml - obWblPrWaveSelect - 운송장출력 이력등록 대상 색인(웨이브관리) */ SELECT OBHD.CTKEY , OBHD.OWKEY , OBHD.DLVRYCORPCD , OBHD.WBLNO , OBHD.OBHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WAHD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WADT ON WAHD.CTKEY = WADT.CTKEY AND WAHD.OWKEY = WADT.OWKEY AND WAHD.WAHDKEY = WADT.WAHDKEY AND WADT.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD ON WADT.CTKEY = OBHD.CTKEY AND WADT.OWKEY = OBHD.OWKEY AND WADT.OBHDKEY = OBHD.OBHDKEY AND WADT.WAHDKEY = OBHD.WAHDKEY WHERE WAHD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WAHD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WAHD.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WAHD.WAWKSTATUSCD >= #{wawkstatuscd}
